target.title: docs: document wacli message verification
target.body:
## Summary

- Add the exact `wacli messages show --chat <jid> --id <message_id>` verification syntax to the bundled wacli skill.
- Clarify that `messages show` does not accept the message ID as a positional argument.
- Recommend verifying stored messages when exact formatting matters, especially multiline sends.

Fixes #88737.

## Testing

- `python skills/skill-creator/scripts/quick_validate.py skills/wacli`
- `git diff --check`
- `/home/shb/.local/share/pnpm/bin/pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 skills/wacli/SKILL.md`
target.author: shbernal
